## [00:00 - 01:39]

This is a pubcast shot. I'm John Loomer. Today we're going to talk about the best way to set up the conversions API. Let's go. So what is the best, easiest, or cheapest way to set up the conversions API? It's a question I get a lot. The truth is that the answer isn't all that simple. Like so many things, it depends. Let me explain. The first question should be, how do you manage your metapixel right now? Because the truth is there might just be a built-in way to turn on the API from that location. So if you're already using WooCommerce, Shopify, or Pixel your site Pro to manage your pixel, it's super easy just to turn on the API. Another example would be if you currently manage the pixel with Google Tag Manager. Assuming that you want to keep doing that, there's a Google Tag Manager solution for the API. You could also use the API gateway. So first ask, where am I managing the pixel right now, and do I want to keep using this tool? That will lead you to your answer. Like I said, it depends.
